title: Glandularia tessmannii
taxonomy: Glandularia tessmannii belongs to the family Verbenaceae, which is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the verbena family. This plant is classified as a species of Glandularia, a genus of flowering plants native to the Americas. Glandularia tessmannii is further classified into the order Lamiales, which includes many other types of flowering plants. The plant's classification is based on its morphology, anatomy, and genetic characteristics. Its classification within the Verbenaceae family suggests a close relationship with other similar flowering plants in the Americas.
